challenges.title: Tablet Story Challenge
challenges.description: Choose the balanced approach in digital dilemmas!
challenges.question: It's tablet time! Which choice shows digital balance?

options.text: Play tablet for 1 hour, then go outside
Play tablet all day without breaks

challenges.title: Screen Quiz Master
challenges.description: Test your knowledge of healthy screen habits!
challenges.question: Answer this question: What's the best screen time limit for kids?

challenges.title: Digital Reflex
challenges.question: Is this a balanced digital activity: 'Playing games for 1 hour then going outside'?

options.text: No, you should only play games
Yes, it balances screen time with outdoor play

challenges.title: Balance Puzzle
challenges.description: Match screen time with its effects!
challenges.question: What effect does balanced screen use have?

options.text: Makes you tired all the time
Helps you stay healthy and active

challenges.title: Homework Priority
challenges.question: You have homework and a game. What's the balanced approach?

options.text: Play game all day, skip homework
Do homework first, then play game for limited time
